editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Dense Map movement now keeps only the active marker budget attached while pan or zoom is in progress.
The Map performance guard now checks attached marker count during movement.
editorialNotes: v26.5.1300-dev is the first May 13 dev build and follows v26.5.1201-dev.
